name: Beihai Gofar Chuanshan Biological Co., Ltd.
summary: Beihai Gofar Marine Biological Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the production and distribution of pharmaceutical products in China. The company offers various medicines and medical devices; and produces and sells pearl eyesight eye drops, gastrointestinal granules, pearl powder, and other proprietary Chinese medicines. It also provides molecular medical imaging and tumor radiotherapy centers, as well as tumor telemedicine technical services. Beihai Gofar Marine Biological Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 is based in Beihai, China.
